mapper.sql: id, title_zh, title_ja, title_en, summary_zh, summary_ja, summary_en, body, category_id, author_id, slug, status, access_password, publish_at, cover_attachment_id, comment_count, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted, deleted_at, deleted_by
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_article WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_article WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 FOR UPDATE
SELECT FROM t_article WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 1 FOR UPDATE
SELECT tag_id FROM t_article_tag WHERE article_id = #{articleId} ORDER BY tag_id ASC

SELECT a.id, a.title_zh, a.title_ja, a.title_en, a.summary_zh, a.summary_ja, a.summary_en, a.category_id, c.name_zh AS category_name_zh, a.slug, a.status, a.publish_at, a.cover_attachment_id, a.comment_count, a.created_at, a.created_by, a.updated_at, a.updated_by FROM t_article a LEFT JOIN t_category c ON c.id = a.category_id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE ORDER BY a.updated_at DESC, a.id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_article a WHERE

SELECT a.id, a.title_zh, a.title_ja, a.title_en, a.summary_zh, a.summary_ja, a.summary_en, a.body, a.category_id, c.name_zh AS category_name_zh, a.author_id, a.slug, a.status, a.publish_at, a.cover_attachment_id, a.comment_count, a.created_at, a.created_by, a.updated_at, a.updated_by FROM t_article a LEFT JOIN t_category c ON c.id = a.category_id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.deleted = 0

SELECT a.id, a.title_zh, a.title_ja, a.title_en, a.summary_zh, a.summary_ja, a.summary_en, a.category_id, c.name_zh AS category_name_zh, c.name_ja AS category_name_ja, c.name_en AS category_name_en, a.slug, a.status, a.publish_at, a.cover_attachment_id, a.comment_count, a.created_at FROM t_article a LEFT JOIN t_category c ON c.id = a.category_id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE ORDER BY a.publish_at DESC, a.id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_article a WHERE

SELECT a.id, a.title_zh, a.title_ja, a.title_en, a.summary_zh, a.summary_ja, a.summary_en, a.body, a.category_id, c.name_zh AS category_name_zh, c.name_ja AS category_name_ja, c.name_en AS category_name_en, a.slug, a.status, a.publish_at, a.cover_attachment_id, a.comment_count, a.created_at FROM t_article a LEFT JOIN t_category c ON c.id = a.category_id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 2 AND a.publish_at <= #{now}
SELECT id, status, comment_count FROM t_article WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT id, title_zh, title_ja, title_en, status, category_id, deleted_at, deleted_by FROM t_article WHERE deleted = 1 ORDER BY deleted_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_article WHERE deleted = 1
SELECT FROM t_article WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 5 AND publish_at <= #{now} ORDER BY publish_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE t_article SET title_zh = #{article.titleZh}, title_ja = #{article.titleJa}, title_en = #{article.titleEn}, summary_zh = #{article.summaryZh}, summary_ja = #{article.summaryJa}, summary_en = #{article.summaryEn}, body = #{article.body}, category_id = #{article.categoryId}, author_id = #{article.authorId}, slug = #{article.slug}, status = #{article.status}, access_password = #{article.accessPassword}, publish_at = #{article.publishAt}, cover_attachment_id = #{article.coverAttachmentId}, comment_count = #{article.commentCount}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{article.id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_article SET deleted = 1, deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, deleted_by = #{deletedBy}, updated_at = #{deletedAt}, updated_by = #{deletedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_article SET deleted = 0, deleted_at = NULL, deleted_by = NULL, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 1
mapper.select: SELECT id, status FROM t_article WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, title_zh FROM t_article WHERE id IN
#{id}
